log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+6=25 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Dhampir — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 24 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:8+6=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:11+6=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:17+6=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Dhampir — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 32 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Dhampir — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dhampir — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Dhampir — Armored Escapist: SUCCESS. 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
